task_objective: Clean up the autosync status strip by making BrowserView the only production surface, removing diagnostic UI and alternate React/composition scaffolding, and archiving superseded status-strip attempt docs.
tests_added: Updated tests/test_frontend_static.py to require BrowserView-only production behavior and reject diagnostic UI, alternate surface modes, React portal/global component registration, and composition-hook artifacts.
design_decisions: Kept the BrowserView creation, wrapper normalization through m_browserView, verbose BrowserView logs, lifecycle/RPC provenance logs, and local_current to has_backup mapping.
Moved status expiry from React component effects to module-level BrowserView timers that clear on hide and plugin dismount.
Removed the debug status strip button from the Logs panel and removed diagnostic labels from BrowserView HTML.
Archived superseded status-strip plans and session logs under docs/archive/status-strip while preserving content.
